title: 信息日报 2026-06-15

headline.title: 伊朗与美国达成和平协议，全球反应
headline.summary: 美国总统特朗普宣布美伊达成和平协议，将重启霍尔木兹海峡航运。巴基斯坦、卡塔尔等国家表示赞赏，认为协议有助于地区和平稳定。
headline.title_en: World reacts as Iran and US reach deal
headline.summary_en: President Trump announced a peace deal with Iran, agreeing to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Pakistan, Qatar and other nations applaud the agreement as a step toward regional peace.
headline.original_title: World reacts as Iran and US reach deal
headline.reason: 美伊冲突是当前全球最大地缘风险，协议缓解了战争升级和能源供应中断的担忧，引发全球金融市场大幅波动，涉及多国利益。
headline.reason_en: The US-Iran conflict was the top geopolitical risk. The deal de-escalates tensions, eases energy supply fears, and triggers global market moves, affecting multiple countries.
